name: Mydei
description:
Mydei finds User within the ruins of Castrum Kremnos and decides to help them escape. Now they're in a tight spot.

TW: Dark, and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed.

User can be anyone/anything.

Updated for 3.1!

This bot was created before the character and story have been fully released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. Please excuse any inaccuracies, I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore, background, and personality. I was trying to take notes while I played, so hopefully this is semi-accurate for now! ☺️
